indicators.name: Large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light to enter, reducing the need for artificial lighting during computer work.

indicators.name: Wooden floor
indicators.rationale: A wooden floor can be comfortable to walk on, but may require cleaning more frequently than other surfaces.

indicators.name: Bed
indicators.rationale: The presence of a bed in the room may lead to distractions or interruptions during computer work.

reasoning_summary: The room is well-suited for computer work due to its large windows and wooden floor, but the presence of a bed could be a distraction.
